title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXII. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Birds of a feather flock together,
            And so will pigs and swine;
        Rats and mice will have their choice,
            And so will I have mine.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXII. Love And Matrimony.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
